description: Made of cotton elastane stretch fabric, providing superior comfort and flexibility Seamless bra with soft foam padding Ideal T-shirt bra Underwire for complete underbust support and excellent cup lift Well designed for semi coverage and good cleavage Soft, adjustable straps rest comfortably on shoulders and leave no marks on your skin Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
